Table '1000000005 1' 3-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 (300 in chips)
Seat 2: TestHero (300 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 (300 in chips)
TestHero: posts small blind 10
Villain2: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to TestHero [Ah Ks]
Villain1: raises 280 to 300 and is all-in
TestHero: raises 280 to 300 and is all-in
Villain2: calls 280 and is all-in
*** FLOP *** [2c 7s Td]
*** TURN *** [2c 7s Td] [5h]
*** RIVER *** [2c 7s Td 5h] [8c]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
TestHero: shows [Ah Ks] (high card Ace)
Villain1: shows [Qd Jd] (high card Queen)
Villain2 mucks hand
TestHero collected 900 from pot
Villain1 finished the tournament in 3rd place
Villain2 finished the tournament in 2nd place
TestHero wins the tournament and receives €2.00 - congratulations!
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 900 | Rake 0
Board [2c 7s Td 5h 8c]
Seat 1: Villain1 (button) showed [Qd Jd] and lost with high card Queen
Seat 2: TestHero (small blind) showed [Ah Ks] and won (900) with high card Ace
Seat 3: Villain2 (big blind) mucked [8d 7d]
